## Checklist

- [ ] Branched off `develop` (not `main`)
- [ ] `make fmt vet test race lint` is green locally
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md` (`## [Unreleased]`) for any user-visible change
- [ ] Updated docs (README / `docs/`) if behavior or flags changed
